title: Mace Aim
description:
If u like this mod check out mace smash by me

Helps u aim with mace using help full guides and colored hud

ALSO NOW HAS A SWORD MODE FOR BREACH SAWPING  default key is P also 
the 1.21.11  version has a toggleable mace line default key M
body:
Helps u aim with mace
ALSO NOW HAS A SWORD MODE FOR BREACH SAWPING  default key is P also 
the 1.21.11  version has a toggleable mace line default key M

Red crosshair = Out of range / not enough fall damage
Yellow crosshair = Can hit, decent damage (3-7 blocks fall)
Green crosshair = Perfect damage zone (8+ blocks fall)

AND RARE:
CYAN FLASHING crosshair = HIT NOW! Won't miss! (overrides other colors when you're aimed perfectly)
